title: Data Engineer/ Datu inženieris(-e) in Finance, Risk and Data Tribe | SEB, Riga

summary.lv: SEB meklē datu inženieri (Finance, Risk and Data Tribe), kas veidos un uzturēs regulatīvus, uz datiem balstītus risinājumus, izmantojot SQL un Python.
summary.en: SEB is hiring a Data Engineer (Finance, Risk and Data Tribe) to build and maintain regulatory, data-driven solutions using SQL and Python.
